_description: Frequently bought items at Walmart. Maps generic item names to preferred specific products. The agent will search for these exact products first before falling back to alternatives.
_instructions: Add items as you buy them. The 'search_term' is what gets typed into Walmart search. 'notes' helps the agent pick the right one if multiple results appear.

paper_towels.search_term: Great Value Paper Towels Triple Rolls

toilet_paper.search_term: Angel Soft Toilet Paper Mega Rolls

dish_soap.notes: Original scent, 18 fl oz or larger

laundry_detergent.search_term: all Free Clear Liquid Laundry Detergent
laundry_detergent.notes: Free and Clear (no dyes/perfumes), 77 oz or larger

dryer_sheets.notes: Pet hair & lint guard, 150 count mega box

trash_bags.search_term: Great Value Tall Kitchen Trash Bags 13 Gallon

granola_bars.search_term: Quaker Chewy Chocolate Chip Granola Bars 18 Count
granola_bars.notes: Chocolate Chip flavor, 18 count value pack, bought 2+ times
